intro: A record of where I am right now, what I am practicing, and a few snapshots of life.

sections.title: Where I Am Now
items: I just received a contractor offer as a software engineer in Tokyo, so I ended my working-holiday life in Australia and Japan earlier than planned.
I want to build my own circle of life in Tokyo: favorite shops, favorite corners, and favorite people.

sections.title: Recent Practices
items: No longer getting anxious ahead of time
Recovering a regular routine and exercise habit, and adjusting my eating habits
Improving my Japanese so I am less often troubled by not having enough Japanese
Modern System Design Bootcamp
Keeping up with AI developments: LLM, Harness, Agent

sections.title: Recent Achievements
items: Found a job in Tokyo
Made friends in a non-native language
Got better at cooking for myself (still not brave enough to cook for others)
Redesigned my personal website

sections.title: Recent Frustrations
items: Japanese and AI anxiety
The regular routine I built during working holiday has fallen apart again
It is too easy to spend too much time reading novels and manga

sections.title: Recent Discoveries
items: The world is vast, vast enough that I can surely find people somewhere doing things similar to what I am doing. No one can really be that special, but that also means even if I feel out of place in my current environment, there must be some corner of the world where I can belong.

I have been away from the software industry for almost a year. The things I worried about and felt anxious over last year did not happen, or at least did not happen that quickly. I suffered more in my imagination than in reality. Following the trend means doing it for as long as I can, but I should not eliminate myself first.

sections.title: Recent Favorites
items: ☀️ The comfortable weather right now: not too cold, not too hot, with sunlight falling down
😎 My redesigned personal website
🎵 J-Pop: The Story of Us (milet), Hitotarashi (Keisuke Kuwata), Salad Bowl (Aooo), illusion (Ryokuoushoku Shakai)
🎨 Manga: Fujii on the Roadside, 100 Meters
📺 Anime: Re:ZERO Season 4, Akane-banashi (the OP is amazing), Yomi no Tsugai
🎬 Movie: Project Hail Mary
